title: Ability to Lock the Left Nav Pane in the workspace
excerpt: Need the ability to lock the left side navigation pane in each workspace - including folders.  Everyday our users keep moving boards around in error.  Sometimes the boards get moved into other folders or re-ordered and o…

posts.author: miwachiw123 (Michelle Iwachiw)
posts.cookedHtml:
Need the ability to lock the left side navigation pane in each workspace - including folders. Everyday our users keep moving boards around in error. Sometimes the boards get moved into other folders or re-ordered and other users cannot find what they are looking for.

This happens in both our CRM and Work Management.
